DOM batch.desc: Single 400→300px batch resize: write all, then read all

DOM interleaved.desc: Single 400→300px batch resize: write + read per div

Our library: layoutWithLines().desc: 60-text shared-corpus batch across widths 180/220/260px; materializes text lines

Our library: walkLineRanges().desc: 60-text shared-corpus batch across widths 180/220/260px; geometry only, no line text strings

Our library: layoutNextLine().desc: 60-text shared-corpus batch across widths 180/220/260px; streaming line-by-line layout
